permutation.interpretation: p=0.000. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 0.240, 95% CI [-0.767, 1.215]. CI includes zero — Sharpe is not distinguishable from noise.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 27.3% of total P&L (1020 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
